description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet, themed for the Sega Out Run racing game. The cabinet features a prominent steering wheel, gear shifter, and pedal controls on a slanted control panel, with a CRT display screen set into the upper front. The exterior is decorated with vibrant artwork, including a red sports car and blue sky on the side panels, and a colorful marquee at the top displaying the Out Run logo. The cabinet stands on a patterned carpet base, with a faux brick wall and retro posters behind it, evoking a nostalgic arcade environment. The front panel includes a coin slot and various control buttons, while the overall structure is boxy and robust, typical of 1980s arcade machines.
description: A Sega Out Run arcade game cabinet with a steering wheel, gear shifter, CRT screen, and vibrant racing-themed artwork. The cabinet is decorated with colorful side graphics, a marquee, and sits on a patterned carpet base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel with steering wheel, gear shifter, buttons, CRT screen, and the Out Run marquee above.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large side panel artwork featuring a red sports car, blue sky, and the Sega Out Run logo.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the faux brick wall backdrop and the back of the cabinet, with no visible controls or artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, displaying the same racing-themed side panel graphics and the cabinet's profile.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, curved, medium size with a visible bezel around the screen.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with a central steering wheel, gear shifter to the right, several buttons, and pedal controls below; control panel is slanted and features racing-themed markings.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; colorful marquee at the top with the Out Run logo, racing imagery, and a bright, retro theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Large, vibrant artwork featuring a red sports car, blue sky, clouds, and the Sega Out Run logo; the graphics are bold and cover most of the side panel.
